description: Defines a provider-agnostic notification request as a Java record, encapsulating details such as event type, IDs, contact info, decision info, and timestamp for notifications related to business loans.

classes.name: NotificationRequest
classes.description: A Java record representing a notification request with relevant event and applicant details.

methods.name: NotificationRequest (constructor)
methods.description: Constructor for creating an immutable NotificationRequest instance with specified fields.
